claims.description: The ACME worker fallback queue is bounded, supports timeout-aware producer backpressure and consumer idle behavior, exposes queue depth, and rejects new work after closure while draining existing work.

claims.description: The AuthN provider integration preserves governed status-code behavior: missing credentials on required provider auth return 403 and wrong bearer credentials return 401, while direct HTTPBearer challenge behavior remains separately verified.

DataTypeSpec and StorageTypeRef define the active canonical semantic datatype center for the next target.
ColumnSpec.datatype is the canonical datatype attachment point on the active next-target line.
TypeAdapter, BaseTypeAdapter, and TypeRegistry provide the executable datatype contract on the active next-target line.
EngineTypeLowerer, EngineRegistry, and EngineDatatypeBridge control engine-owned lowering on the active next-target line.
ReflectedTypeMapper governs reverse mapping and reflection import behavior on the active next-target line.
Relational, dataframe, file, cache, and probabilistic engine families align to the datatype bridge contract on the active next-target line.
Table portability and interoperability rules are specified as governed next-target work on the active line.
Reflection-driven round-trip schema recovery is defined with best-effort and metadata-preserving modes on the active next-target line.
